description: Letter in Hebrew mentioning payments in gold peraḥīm coinage. Dated 24 Nissan below the main section of text, possibly with a two-alphanumeral year. The latter part of the date is unclear in meaning, but likely falls in the 15th- or 16th-century based on the paleography.
description_he: מכתב בעברית המזכיר תשלומים במטבע פרחים זהב; מתוארך 24 בניסן, כנראה מהמאה ה-15 או 16
